title: JW Marriott Bengaluru Prestige Golfshire
lead: A resort of significant scale on a 22-acre Nandi Hills estate: 301 keys, a 35,000 sq ft convention centre, and a pillarless ballroom requiring precision joinery and bespoke furniture across every category.
body: Velmont delivered the complete interior fit-out for JW Marriott Bengaluru Prestige Golfshire Resort & Spa, working across rooms, suites, villas, and the resort's extensive convention facilities. The scope spanned custom furniture manufacturing, built-in joinery, wall panelling, and soft furnishings, all produced and quality-checked at Velmont's in-house facility before site delivery.

The convention centre alone required coordination across 35,000 sq ft of event space, including a 24,000 sq ft pillarless ballroom with specification-grade AV integration, bespoke ceiling treatments, and full banqueting furniture packages. Villa and suite interiors were executed to Hirsch Bedner Associates' design drawings, with Velmont managing procurement, fabrication, and on-site installation.
Delivered on schedule to Marriott brand standards, a project that established Velmont's capability at the highest tier of luxury hospitality fit-out.

title: Taj Malabar Resort & Spa, Kochi
lead: A heritage property of significant standing: a year-long renovation of a 90-year-old Taj icon on Willingdon Island, restoring and upgrading 93 keys and three F&B outlets without compromising the property's historic character.
body: Velmont delivered the full interior fit-out for the renovation of Taj Malabar Resort & Spa, Cochin, one of IHCL's most storied heritage properties. The scope covered all 82 rooms and 11 suites, the Mattancherry Bar, Pepper Restaurant, and ancillary public spaces, requiring close coordination between preservation requirements and contemporary luxury standards.

Custom furniture and joinery were manufactured at Velmont's in-house facility and delivered to site pre-finished, reducing on-site installation time and protecting the heritage structure from prolonged disruption. Bedroom casegoods, upholstered seating, built-in wardrobes, and F&B fitout, including bespoke bar millwork for the Mattancherry Bar, were all fabricated and installed by Velmont's teams.
The renovation was completed on programme to Taj brand specification, with all 93 keys returned to service on schedule.

title: ITC Ratnadipa, Colombo
lead: A 33-storey coastal tower opening onto Colombo's Galle Face Green: 352 rooms, 12 food and beverage outlets, and 40,000 sq ft of banqueting space requiring bespoke furniture and joinery manufactured to international luxury brand specification.
body: Velmont supplied custom furniture and bespoke joinery for ITC Ratnadipa, Colombo, ITC Hotels' landmark entry into Sri Lanka and one of South Asia's most significant luxury hotel openings of 2024. With a 33-floor tower comprising 352 rooms and suites and 12 distinct restaurants and bars, the project demanded high-volume precision manufacturing with no compromise on finish quality.

Velmont's in-house manufacturing facility produced room casegoods, in-room joinery, and upholstered furniture packages across all room categories, from standard rooms to the property's signature suites. Items were quality-checked in Velmont's Bangalore facility, packed to international shipping standards, and delivered on a phased schedule aligned with the main contractor's fit-out programme.
The hotel opened on schedule in April 2024 to critical acclaim, positioning ITC Ratnadipa as Colombo's premier luxury address.

title: Marriott Marquis New Delhi
lead: India's largest hotel project: 590 rooms, 85,000 sq ft of meeting space, and 2.5 million sq ft of construction near Delhi's international airport. A project defined by scale, schedule, and delivery to Marriott Marquis brand standards.
body: Velmont delivered the interior fit-out for Marriott Marquis New Delhi, Aerocity, one of the largest and most complex hotel projects to be delivered in India. The scope spanned 590 rooms and suites, the hotel's expansive conference and banqueting facilities, and all F&B outlet interiors across a 7.70-acre site rising seven storeys.

Custom furniture, built-in joinery, and bespoke millwork were manufactured at Velmont's in-house facility in Bangalore and delivered to site on a phased schedule, a programme that required precise coordination given the sheer scale of the property and the multiple trades working in parallel on different floors simultaneously.
Marriott Marquis New Delhi opened in 2025, immediately establishing itself as the flagship luxury hospitality destination in Delhi's Aerocity district.

title: Ministry of External Affairs — Bangalore
lead: A government workplace delivered to specification for the Ministry of External Affairs, demanding precision, discretion, and adherence to public sector procurement and quality standards.
body: Velmont delivered the interior fit-out for the Ministry of External Affairs' Bangalore office, a government workplace project requiring compliance with public sector procurement standards alongside the quality benchmarks Velmont applies to all projects in its portfolio.

The scope encompassed workstation systems, partitioning, joinery, storage solutions, and public-facing counter areas, all manufactured at Velmont's in-house facility and installed by Velmont's site teams.

title: Taj Exotica Resort & Spa, Andamans
lead: An all-villa retreat across 46 acres of Andaman rainforest: 72 individual villas, each inspired by the indigenous Nicobari architectural tradition, requiring bespoke furniture and joinery sympathetic to the natural setting and the demands of a tropical coastal environment.
body: Velmont delivered the interior fit-out for Taj Exotica Resort & Spa, Andamans, an all-villa resort where every piece of furniture and joinery was required to perform to luxury Taj standards in a remote island environment subject to high humidity, salt air, and tropical climate conditions.

All 72 villas were fitted with Velmont-manufactured casegoods, beds, upholstered seating, and built-in joinery produced with marine-grade substrates and finishes specified for the coastal environment. The villas' stilt construction and organic aesthetic required detailing sympathetic to the resort's design intent, with bespoke pieces featuring natural textures and warm timber finishes that referenced the indigenous Nicobari architectural language without direct pastiche.
Delivered to Taj's specification on a challenging island logistics programme, with all items barged or airfreighted to Havelock Island and installed by Velmont's on-site teams.

title: Allianz Technology, Technopark Phase III
lead: A multi-floor corporate fit-out for Allianz's technology and shared-services teams across several buildings in Technopark Phase III, including the gold-certified Niagara building.
body: Velmont delivered the interior fit-out for Allianz Services & Technology's office floors at Technopark Phase III, Thiruvananthapuram — a campus housing the insurer's global technology and shared-services operations across buildings including Keystone, Bhavani, Carnival, Ganga, and the newly inaugurated Niagara.
The scope covered workstation and cabin furniture, joinery, and finishing across the leased floors, executed to corporate-standard specifications for a global financial-services tenant.

title: Apollo Hospital, Golf Course Road
location: Sector 28, Golf Course Road, Gurugram, Haryana
lead: A new flagship multi-specialty Apollo hospital on Gurugram's Golf Course Road, part of the group's expansion into Delhi-NCR's premium healthcare segment.
body: Velmont is delivering the interior fit-out for Apollo Hospitals' new flagship facility in Sector 28, Gurugram, near the Rapid Metro corridor — a multi-specialty hospital built to the group's premium care standards.

The scope spans clinical and patient-facing interiors, requiring close coordination with medical planning and infection-control standards alongside Velmont's standard joinery and furniture manufacturing capability.

title: Embassy Splendid TechZone
lead: An office fit-out within Embassy Splendid TechZone, a roughly 5 million sq ft integrated tech park on Chennai's Pallavaram-Thoraipakkam corridor.
body: Velmont delivered interior fit-out works for tenant office space at Embassy Splendid TechZone, a large-format SEZ campus on the Pallavaram-Thoraipakkam Radial Road in Chennai's OMR micro-market.
The project was executed to the standards expected of a Grade-A tech park anchored by major global corporate tenants.

title: Gopalan Signature Mall, Tin Factory
lead: A roughly 3.5 lakh sq ft retail, dining and entertainment mall on Bengaluru's Old Madras Road, anchored at the Tin Factory junction.
body: Velmont delivered interior fit-out works for Gopalan Signature Mall, a large-format retail and entertainment destination near Bengaluru's Tin Factory junction, with roughly 3 lakh sq ft of leasable retail space across cinema, food court, and retail zones.
The scope covered common-area finishes, storefront coordination, and food-court furniture across the mall's public circulation spaces.

title: Grand Hyatt, Ireo City
lead: A Grand Hyatt-branded hotel within Ireo City, a roughly 500-acre mixed-use township on Gurugram's Golf Course Extension Road, with architecture by Foster + Partners and interiors by Tony Chi.
body: Velmont delivered interior fit-out works for the Grand Hyatt Hotel & Residences within Ireo City, a large mixed-use township combining hotel, residential, retail and office components in Sector 58, Gurugram.
Execution followed Tony Chi's interior design language across guest rooms and public areas, within a Foster + Partners-designed building envelope.

title: Kauvery Hospital, Kovilambakkam
location: Radial Road, Kovilambakkam, Chennai, Tamil Nadu
lead: Kauvery Hospitals' second Chennai multi-specialty facility on Radial Road, Kovilambakkam, with Centres of Excellence spanning Neuro, Cardiac, Gastro, Renal, and Women & Childcare.
body: Velmont delivered the interior fit-out for Kauvery Hospital's Kovilambakkam facility, a multi-specialty hospital roughly 9 km from Chennai International Airport, covering Centres of Excellence in Neuro, Cardiac, Gastro, Renal, Women & Childcare, and Trauma & Emergency Medicine.
The scope spanned clinical and patient-care interiors, nurse stations, and waiting areas, built to healthcare-grade finish and hygiene standards.

title: Moxy Bengaluru Airport
location: Prestige Tech Cloud, Devanahalli, Bengaluru, Karnataka
lead: India's first Moxy-branded hotel, 128 rooms minutes from Kempegowda International Airport within the Prestige Tech Cloud development.
body: Velmont delivered the interior fit-out for Moxy Bengaluru Airport, the first Moxy-branded property in India, located within the Prestige Tech Cloud development near Kempegowda International Airport.
The 128-key hotel includes six suites, two restaurants, two bars, and an outdoor pool — Velmont's scope covered guest room furniture, joinery, and F&B interiors to Marriott brand standards.

title: Shangri-La Bengaluru
location: Palace Road, Vasanth Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka
lead: A 5-star luxury hotel on Palace Road in Bengaluru's Vasanth Nagar CBD, close to Bangalore Palace and the Bangalore Golf Club.
body: Velmont delivered interior fit-out works for Shangri-La Bengaluru, a luxury hotel in the heart of the city's Vasanth Nagar central business district.
The scope covered guest room and public-area joinery and furniture, executed to Shangri-La's international brand standards.

title: Shell Technology Centre Bangalore
lead: A LEED Gold-certified, 52-acre R&D campus housing up to 1,500 engineers — one of only three Shell technology centres worldwide.
body: Velmont delivered interior fit-out works for Shell Technology Centre Bangalore, an innovation hub for LNG, subsurface modelling, data analytics, engineering design, distillation, and water technology, and one of Shell's three global technology centres alongside facilities in the USA and Netherlands.
The scope covered office and lab-support interiors across the LEED Gold-certified campus, built to the standards of a global energy-sector R&D facility.

title: Shibaura Machine India HQ
lead: The India head office and manufacturing facility for Shibaura Machine, a Japanese plastic injection moulding machine manufacturer operating since 1991.
body: Velmont is delivering interior fit-out works for Shibaura Machine India's head office and manufacturing facility on the Chennai-Bangalore Highway, Poonamallee Taluk — the Indian subsidiary of Japan's Shibaura Machine Co. (formerly Toshiba Machine).
The scope covers administrative office interiors alongside the facility's manufacturing operations, serving Shibaura's automotive, medical, FMCG, and packaging-industry clients.

title: Taj Cochin International Airport
lead: A 111-key airport hotel adjacent to Cochin International Airport, blending contemporary design with Kerala's artistic heritage.
body: Velmont delivered the interior fit-out for Taj Cochin International Airport, a partnership between IHCL and Cochin International Airport Ltd. located at Nedumbassery.

The 111-room hotel includes over 5,000 sq ft of banquet space, the J Wellness Circle spa, an indoor pool, and Pan-Asian dining outlets — Velmont's scope spanned guest room furniture, joinery, and public-area interiors to Taj brand standards.

title: Wells Fargo, Embassy Splendid TechZone
lead: A corporate office fit-out for Wells Fargo within Embassy Splendid TechZone, one of Chennai's largest Grade-A SEZ tech parks.
body: Velmont delivered the interior fit-out for Wells Fargo International Solutions' office at Embassy Splendid TechZone, a roughly 5 million sq ft SEZ campus on Chennai's Pallavaram-Thoraipakkam Radial Road.
The scope covered workstation and cabin furniture, meeting room joinery, and finishes to the corporate-standard specification expected of a global financial-services tenant.
